1.name: DataWhere
1.short_description: One search box, search through all your data
1.description: DataWhere is a universal data source access platform, designed to be a unified data query entry. Through pluggable data source adapters, it supports connecting to various databases, caches, message queues, and more. Currently supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, OceanBase, RocketMQ, and RabbitMQ, with more data source types being added continuously. Core principles: Unified (one entry for any data source), Simple (as easy to use as a search engine), Secure (read-only mode, data stays local).
features: Universal data source access: pluggable architecture, continuously expanding
MySQL 5.6.x ~ 8.4.x: database browsing, read-only SQL queries
PostgreSQL 12.x ~ 17.x: database, schema, and table browsing, read-only SQL queries
Redis 5.x ~ 7.x: key browsing and value inspection
Kafka 2.8.x ~ 3.6.x: topic browsing and message viewing
OceanBase (MySQL compatible mode): database browsing, read-only SQL queries
RocketMQ 4.x ~ 5.x: topic browsing, message viewing, consumer group management
RabbitMQ 3.8.x ~ 4.2.x: queue browsing, message viewing, exchange management
SOCKS5 proxy support: automatic tunnel connection in VPN environments
Global search: one search box across data source types and instances
Data source management: unified management of all connections
Metadata sync: automatic sync of data source metadata to local index
Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
Config sharing: copy and share data source info for onboarding
Secure: Ed25519 digital signature verification, strict read-only mode

rich.intro: Say goodbye to the hassle of switching tools for data queries!
rich.intro_desc: Building a dedicated data retrieval entry for every team member — product, operations, development, and DevOps.
rich.search_desc: One search box to instantly locate data assets across any data source. Currently supports
rich.search_more: , with more data sources being added — no tool switching, no complex commands, making data queries as simple as using a search engine.
rich.safety_desc: Naturally eliminates the risk of accidental operations. Unlike traditional database tools, we fundamentally restrict write permissions — so you can confidently hand the tool to any colleague who needs to query data, without worrying about accidental data modification or deletion.
rich.core_1_desc: One entry point for any data source
rich.core_2_desc: As easy to use as a search engine

4.name: MoyuSpreadsheet
4.description: A match-3 puzzle game disguised as a WPS Excel spreadsheet. The interface faithfully replicates spreadsheet software with light/dark/minimal themes, making it the perfect camouflage when the boss approaches. Enjoy a fun puzzle game while looking like you're hard at work.
features: Perfect disguise: faithfully replicates WPS Excel interface
Three themes: light, dark, and minimal modes
Quick hide: boss key for instant camouflage switch
Match-3 gameplay: classic and simple puzzle fun

screenshots.title: Game Main Interface
screenshots.description: A match-3 game disguised as a spreadsheet

5.name: BianDuoXing
5.short_description: Fun bowel movement tracker & gut health mini program
5.description: BianDuoXing is a fun and lighthearted WeChat mini program for tracking bowel movements and managing gut health. It uses playful design to lower the barrier of recording, scientifically evaluates gut health with the Bristol Stool Scale, and helps users build healthy bathroom habits.
features: One-tap timer: quickly record duration, done in 3 seconds
Bristol Scale: scientifically assess stool type for gut health insights
Fun scoring: emoji-based ratings make tracking embarrassment-free
Calendar view: intuitive daily check-in calendar for habit building
AI commentary: AI analyzes your data for personalized health tips
Statistics: weekly and monthly reports to track health trends
WeChat mini program: no download needed, scan and go

screenshots.title: Home
screenshots.description: Fun and playful recording home screen

rich.intro: Track every bathroom trip, protect your gut health with data!
rich.intro_desc: Making bowel movement tracking fun and easy — scientifically understand your gut health.
rich.scan_desc: Scan the mini program QR code below with WeChat to get started. No download or installation needed — open and use instantly, with data securely saved in the cloud.
rich.health_desc: Based on the Bristol Stool Scale, using a 7-level scientific standard to evaluate gut health. Combined with AI-powered analysis, providing personalized health advice for every bathroom visit.
rich.core_1_desc: Emoji scoring, lighthearted copy, no awkwardness

about.title: About OPC
about.subtitle: The story behind One Person Company

story.title: My Story
story.content: OPC (One Person Company) represents a new way of building software. As an independent developer, I believe in creating products that are thoughtfully designed, well-crafted, and directly supported by the person who built them.
